lemon_market_new_listings.description: This car is in fair condition — fully functional and drivable but showing noticeable wear and minor issues that may need attention.

This car is in mint condition. It runs and drives flawlessly with no mechanical issues whatsoever. The exterior and interior show no meaningful wear, with paint, trim, and upholstery all in excellent shape. This is an exceptionally clean example that has been very well maintained.

This car is in good condition. It runs and drives well with no major mechanical issues. The exterior shows some minor wear including light scratches and small scuffs, but no significant dents or structural damage. The interior is clean with normal use visible on high-contact surfaces. All major systems are functional.

This vehicle is being offered in poor condition and is priced accordingly to reflect its current state honestly. The exterior shows significant wear — expect multiple scratches, dents, faded or peeling paint, and visible rust in areas. The interior is well-worn with torn upholstery, damaged trim pieces, and general deterioration throughout the cabin. Mechanically, the vehicle has known issues and will likely require attention and repairs before it can be considered fully reliable — buyers should budget for additional work. This car is best suited for someone comfortable with a project vehicle, a parts donor, or a buyer with mechanical skills who can address the existing problems. There are no warranties implied or offered, and a pre-purchase inspection is strongly encouraged. What you see is what you get — this is an honest listing for a car in genuinely poor shape.

This vehicle is offered in truly exceptional, mint condition — and that's not a term we use lightly. From bumper to bumper, this car presents as near-new: the exterior paint is deep, vibrant, and free of scratches, chips, swirl marks, or blemishes of any kind. The body panels are straight and true, all trim pieces are intact and lustrous, and the glass is crystal clear without chips or cracks. Step inside and you'll find an interior that looks and smells fresh — the seats show no wear, the carpets are spotless, and every surface is clean and unmarked. Mechanically, this vehicle is in outstanding shape: the engine runs smoothly and quietly, all systems function exactly as they should, and there are no warning lights, leaks, or known issues. The tires have excellent tread remaining, and the brakes are in great condition. Service history is up to date. This is a rare opportunity to purchase a used vehicle that genuinely rivals the showroom experience — buyers who inspect it in person will not be disappointed.

Looking for a budget ride or a project car with potential? This vehicle is priced to reflect its current condition — it shows significant wear inside and out, including visible body damage and a well-used interior, and will likely need some mechanical attention to get it running at its best. That said, it's a real opportunity for a handy buyer or someone who just needs basic transportation on a tight budget. Come take a look and see if it's the right fit for you!

This exceptional vehicle is the definition of turn-key ready. Boasting a flawless exterior with zero blemishes, a pristine interior that looks and smells factory-fresh, and a mechanically sound drivetrain that performs exactly as intended, this car has been meticulously maintained throughout its life. Full service records are available, and every system — from climate control to safety features — operates perfectly. Whether you're a discerning buyer seeking a worry-free ownership experience or simply want the best available on the market today, this is it. Don't miss your chance to own a vehicle that truly lives up to the word 'mint.'

Hey there, car lovers! 🚗✨ I'm so excited to share this absolute gem with you today. This beauty has been babied from day one — garaged, regularly serviced, and treated like a member of the family. The paint still turns heads like it just rolled off the showroom floor, the interior is spotless and fresh-smelling, and everything runs like a dream. We're talking the kind of car that makes your neighbors do a double-take every time you pull into the driveway. I've owned a lot of cars over the years, and I can honestly say this one has a special place in my heart — which is exactly why I want it to go to someone who'll love it just as much. Don't miss your chance to drive home in something truly special. Come take a look — I promise you won't be disappointed!

Presenting a truly exceptional example that checks every box for the discerning enthusiast. This machine rolls out with a meticulously maintained powertrain — valvetrain geometry dialed in, cooling system operating at peak thermal efficiency, and a transmission that snicks through the gates with zero hesitation or slop. The suspension geometry is tight, with no perceptible play in the bushings or ball joints, delivering a connected, confidence-inspiring drive feel. Bodywork presents with laser-straight panel gaps and factory-fresh depth in the clearcoat — no orange peel, no micro-scratches, no evidence of prior correction work. Interior surfaces are immaculate: no bolster wear, no dash cracks, no headliner sag. This is a driver-quality specimen that has clearly been garaged, serviced on interval, and treated with the respect it deserves. Documented maintenance history available. Priced to move for the buyer who knows what they're looking at.
Flawless inside and out. Zero excuses, zero issues. Drives like it just left the lot. Serious buyers only.

Some cars are merely transportation. This one is a conversation starter, a time capsule, a rolling testament to what happens when meticulous ownership meets genuine passion. From the moment you slip behind the wheel, you'll sense it — the kind of presence that turns heads at stoplights and invites strangers to ask questions. Every surface tells a story of careful stewardship: a vehicle that has clearly been cherished, not just driven. The paint catches afternoon light like it just rolled off the showroom floor, the interior wraps around you with that rare combination of freshness and warmth that only the best-kept examples possess. This isn't a car you settle for — it's a car you remember. Opportunities like this don't linger. The next owner will understand immediately why this one is different.

Presenting an exceptional opportunity: this stunning vehicle arrives in true mint condition, turning heads from every angle. The flawless exterior finish reflects like a mirror, completely free of scratches, chips, or blemishes. Step inside to find an immaculate cabin where every surface, stitch, and surface detail remains pristine — exactly as it left the factory floor. Under the hood, this machine runs with smooth, confident authority, having been meticulously maintained throughout its life. Full service records available. This is the rare find serious buyers wait months for — a pre-owned vehicle that genuinely delivers on every promise. Don't let this one pass you by.
